subject: Request: CloudStack Sandbox API Credential Exchange
body:
Hi Vendor Relations Team,

CloudStack has offered to provide sandbox API credentials for testing their integration with our platform. To facilitate this exchange securely, I'm asking you to coordinate the credential transfer through our APPROVED secure channel: the 1Password shared vault.

Please do the following:

1. Contact CloudStack to initiate the credential handoff
2. Request that they provide the sandbox API credentials (API key and secret key) through our 1Password Business account
3. Set up or use an existing shared vault with appropriate access controls for our integration team
4. Ensure only necessary team members have vault access

Critical: Credentials should NOT be transmitted via email or any other insecure method. The 1Password shared vault is our approved secure channel for this type of sensitive information exchange.

Please confirm once the vault setup is complete and credentials have been securely transferred.

Thanks,
Internal Communications
